summary: Stabilize tqdm progress bars with multi-thread logging by aligning output streams and using a shared lock; keep child bars non-leaving.
source_links: user-report: comprehensive report progress bars broke due to logs/threads

summary: When AI comment summaries are missing, report explicit reasons (timeout, disabled, model missing, response missing, or insufficient info in comments).
source_links: user-report: AI comments show 'Insufficient data' without reason

summary: If progress bars still break after log writes, refresh all active tqdm instances after each log emission to restore bar positions.
source_links: user-report: progress bar interrupted by log warnings

summary: Provide a progress_children flag to disable per-thread tqdm bars for IDE consoles that don't handle multiple lines reliably.
source_links: user-report: IDE progress bars still break; request single-bar mode

summary: Weekly email status quality improves when all comments from the selected week are aggregated (not only latest), with deterministic cleanup and English-safe fallback.
source_links: user-feedback: report must be closer to dense weekly status format and in English

summary: Guard AI WebUI response JSON type before .get access; downgrade retry-timeout logs to DEBUG to preserve progress-bar readability.
source_links: user-report: NoneType.get error in webui and progress bar broken by timeout warnings

summary: Handle Ctrl+C globally with exit code 130 and no traceback; treat invalid AI JSON payload type as transient and retryable.
source_links: user-report: Ctrl+C should stop all reports cleanly; webui invalid JSON NoneType during overload
